abilities.name: Demise (Eternal)
abilities.text: Once per turn. After this model is killed, it may discard a card. If it does so, it heals 4.

abilities.name: Shifting Earth
abilities.text: When this model activates, it may choose another ally within 3" and place it anywhere within 3" of this model.

actions.name: Uprooted Fists
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this attack receives a raise, this model may make a Bog marker within 3" of this model.

triggers.name: Barricade
triggers.text: This model gains a Bolstered token.

triggers.name: Hexed Gambit
triggers.text: Target must have a Stunned token. This model may discard and draw a card.

actions.name: Mud Bomb
actions.effects: This model may remove a token from the target.

triggers.name: Bog's Vitality
triggers.text: Allies within (r)3" of the target heal 2.

triggers.name: On Your Heels
triggers.text: Place this model into base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Premonition
triggers.text: Look at the top card of your fate deck. This model may discard it.

triggers.name: Foot in the Bog
triggers.text: Make a Bog marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: The Woods Have Eyes
actions.effects: Target gains Stunned and Poison tokens.

actions.name: Bayou Cursed
actions.effects: Remove any number of Bog markers or Stunned tokens from models within range. This model heals 1 for each marker or token removed (to a maximum of 3).
